messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

## 2025年度先锋出海应用/游戏

message.content: This section serves as a heading that can answer retrieval questions regarding the covered topic (2025 pioneer Chinese-developed mobile apps and games), the target market scope (global/international markets), and the reference year (2025). As a standalone title, it does not contain specific entity names, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types.
